data.body:
=== POST-MORTEM: how the detailed criteria list got silently dropped (communication failure) ===

Joe asked how we missed criteria the previous session had detailed. Read the actual handoff artifacts (session-log
comments 40 handoff + 41 experiment-prompt). The failure is a 3-link chain, not just "built from a subset":

1. COMPRESSION WITHOUT A CHECKLIST. The detailed list existed (dso-dimension-catalog-v2 ~150 dims + the design
   docs), but the handoff pointed the fresh session at §5 of the design-of-record — a DENSE PROSE INDEX using
   shorthand that under-counts ("T5a-e ..." = 5 overlays in one token; "G1+G2"; "T2 empirical probe" = 3 words in a
   13-item running list). The full catalog was off the handoff path.
2. AN OVER-APPLIED, NEVER-REVERTED SCOPE CUT. The experiment prompt said "apply ONLY the Layer-2 advisory/judgment
   criteria" (a legitimate narrowing for the CHUNKING experiment). I misread "Layer-2 advisory" as the F/E/G
   judgment dozen and EXCLUDED the triggered overlays — but overlays ARE Layer-2 advisory (§2/§5). And the
   "for this experiment" narrowing became permanent: every later criteria_vN was built from the previous narrowed
   file, never re-expanded against §5.
3. NO MACHINE-CHECKABLE REGISTRY. Criteria existed only as prose; there was no enumerated list to diff an
   implementation against, so "did I capture all of them?" had no failing test. The drop was undetectable.

ROOT CAUSE = #3 enabling #1 and #2: a long list compressed to shorthand prose + a reasonable scope-cut over-applied
and never reverted + no completeness check.

DURABLE FIX (this turn): completed criteria_v5.json to ALL 22 single-turn/overlay descriptors (the v4 fix had
missed T1/T6/T7/T8/T9 too — the guard caught that), and added docs/experiments/data/check_registry_coverage.py — a
mechanical guard encoding the canonical v4 §5 registry that FAILS LOUDLY on any omission. Run against the old
criteria_v2.json it lists all 10 dropped criteria (would have caught this immediately); passes on v5. Updated
criteria-registry-reconciliation.md. Committed 4aa52a71.

STILL OWED (descriptors exist, no coverage DATA): T1/T3/T4/T5d/T6/T7/T9 + COH never run; G3/G4 container; DET
P2/P3/P5/P6/P7. Next: a validation pass so the whole registry has coverage.
